text: It was lovely to talk to you. Let's keep in touch.
I'm sorry -- could you say that again?
Could you speak more slowly, please?
What do you mean by that?
Could you check that again, please?
Would it be possible to change the room?
Just to make sure, could you repeat that?
I think there might be a mistake. Could you check again, please?
I'm sorry for the delay. My flight was cancelled.
I do not need perfect English. I need calm English, and I speak for my institution myself.

Hi Maria Clara, it is Bruno. I am calling before you land in Seoul, so please listen carefully. There is a small problem, but do not worry. First, the hotel says there might be a mistake with your reservation, because the date is wrong. If your name is not on the list, stay calm and ask them to check again. Second, the interpreter's flight is delayed, and it might be cancelled, so you may be alone at the conference desk for one day. And one more thing: last time they gave you the wrong badge, so just to make sure, check the session on your badge. You know what to do. Ask, apologize if you need to, and solve it one question at a time. Bear with them, and they will bear with you. Call me if you need anything. See you soon.

Let me tell you about my first day in Seoul. Almost everything went wrong. My reservation was not on the list. The interpreter's flight was cancelled. And they gave me the wrong badge for the wrong session. Last year, I know what I would have done. I would have switched to Portuguese, and gone quiet. But not this time. I took a breath and I said, I think there might be a mistake, could you check again, please? When I did not understand, I said, I'm sorry, could you say that again? When I needed a moment, I said, bear with me. Nothing was perfect. But I solved every problem, one polite question at a time. I did not need perfect English. I needed calm English. And this time, I stayed. I stayed in English, and I spoke for my institution myself.
Could you check the list again, please?
Would it be possible to change the room?
Just to make sure, could you repeat that?
Could you replace this badge, please?
I think there might be a mistake. Could you check again, please?
I'm sorry -- could you say that again?
I'm sorry for the delay. My flight was cancelled.
I do not need perfect English. I need calm English.
